headline: Undocumented migrants detained in 18 facilities nationwide
context: As of January 2025, an estimated 18,000 undocumented migrants were held in 18 immigration detention centres across Malaysia.

cards.big: 18,000 undocumented migrants held in 18 detention centres across Malaysia
cards.sub: Detention periods average 14 months with limited access to legal representation

cards.big: Immigration Act 1959 Section 34 allows detention until deportation without limit
cards.sub: No automatic judicial review of detention duration required by law

cards.big: Suhakam documented 42 detainee deaths in immigration facilities since 2018
cards.sub: Overcrowding, inadequate healthcare cited as contributing factors

cards.big: Estimated 3.2 million undocumented migrants live in Malaysia as of 2025
cards.sub: Labour market demand and porous borders sustain the population

cards.big: Detaining 18,000 indefinitely without solving migration is punishment without purpose
Home Ministry deported 67,000 migrants in 2024 at cost of RM340 million
